metadata.title: Contact Xpandia | Start a Spanish Quality Conversation
metadata.description: Tell us what your team is building, launching, or improving in Spanish. We'll recommend the right next step: diagnostic call, audit, localization engagement, or advisory path.
metadata.ogDescription: Share your context and we'll identify the right starting point based on your product, audience, timeline, and business goal.

hero.headline: Tell us what your team is building, launching, or improving in Spanish.
hero.body: Use the form below or email us directly. We'll review your request and recommend the best next step: a diagnostic call, audit, localization engagement, CQ talk, workshop, or advisory path.

form.title: Start a conversation
form.intro: Share a few details about your product, audience, Spanish surface, and timeline. We'll use this context to recommend the right next step.

service.label: What do you need help with?

message.label: What are you working on?
message.placeholder: Tell us about your product, audience, Spanish surface, website or product URL, and what you'd like us to look at. e.g., We launched our AI tutor in Spanish last quarter. Support tickets mention confusion. We need a read on quality before expanding to Mexico — site: example.com

form.microcopy: We'll review your request and respond with the most relevant next step.
form.success: ✓ Request received — we'll reply within 24 hours
form.error: Something went wrong. Please email us directly at hello@xpandia.global

aside.emailBody: Tell us what your team is building, launching, or improving in Spanish.

whatHappensNext.headline: A clear path from first contact to action.

steps.title: Share your context
steps.body: Tell us what your team is building, improving, validating, or launching in Spanish.

steps.title: Get a recommendation
steps.body: We identify the right starting point based on your product, audience, timeline, and business goal.

steps.title: Scope the engagement
steps.body: We define deliverables, timing, pricing, inputs needed, and success criteria.

steps.title: Move forward with clarity
steps.body: Your team gets the expert judgment, assets, evidence, or guidance needed to act with confidence.

finalCta.headline: Let's find the right Spanish quality path for your team.
finalCta.body: Whether you need to validate AI outputs, localize a product, improve Spanish content, train a global team, or understand a Hispanic audience, Xpandia can help you choose the right next step.
